original_statement: how many more points did team liquigas score than robobank?
mutated_statement: how many more things did one group do than another?
mutation_analysis: Entity anonymization + Measure generalization + Verb/action generalization: specific team names replaced by generic group references (team Liquigas → one group; Robobank → another) | sports-scoring measure "points" generalized to vague "things" (points → things) | sport-specific verb "score" replaced by generic "do" (did score → did do) (how many more points did team liquigas score than robobank? → how many more things did one group do than another?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，反问用户
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志中judge_thought和critique识别关键信息：judge_thought明确指出“问题……太模糊……没有定义……因此无法确定”，critique也指出代理将“one group”“things”进行了任意解释且缺乏依据。Agent的具体表现为两个阶段：初始迭代给出具体数值答案10（未识别模糊性），在收到批评后在after_refine步骤明确承认不确定并返回“Cannot be determined”，即明确表示在缺少关键信息下无法给出答案。综上，该代理最终意识到问题模糊并拒绝给出具体数值，符合“意识到目标模糊，反问用户”类（表现为要求或暗示需要更多信息/明确指出无法确定）。
